case_title: AUTO RETURN VS ANDERSON, ELDON EUGENE

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTO RETURN AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, ELDON EUGENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, ELDON EUGENE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTO RETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, ELDON EUGENE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT ELDON EUGENE ANDERSON, RETURNED "UNDELIVERABLE ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
